scripts.versioning:check: node --import tsx devops/sources/versioning.ts --workspace-path . --manifest-path source/Cargo.toml --package-name online-dsl-forge --lockfile-path Cargo.lock
scripts.versioning:release: node --import tsx devops/sources/versioning.ts --workspace-path . --manifest-path source/Cargo.toml --package-name online-dsl-forge --lockfile-path Cargo.lock --ref "$ONLINE_DSL_FORGE_RELEASE_REF" --release-publish
